# Brand References — Complete Brand Catalog

Complete catalog of 152 brands in `design-systems/`. Each brand has a full `DESIGN.md` with 9 sections, `tokens.css`, `tailwind-v4.css`, previews, and more.

## Token Schema

See `skills/DESIGN-SYSTEMS.md` for the complete 4-layer schema (A1-identity, A1-structure, A2, B-slot).

## Layer Summary

```
A1-identity (required):  --bg, --fg, --accent, --font-display
A1-structure (required): Type scale, --container-max, --section-y-*
A2 (with fallback):      --motion-fast, --success, --space-4, --font-mono
B-slot (aliasable):      --fg-2, --surface-warm, --border-soft
```
